ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)
Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification
Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)

ingredients_text: Dark chocolate (50 %) (cocoa mass, sugar, cocoa butter, emulsifier (soy lecithin), natural vanilla), fleur de sel caramel filling (25 %) (sugar, cream, glucose syrup, butter oil, fleur de sel, emulsifier (soy lecithin)), forest berry caramel filling (25 %) (sugar, cream, glucose syrup, butter oil, forest berry puree, freeze-dried raspberries, emulsifier (soy lecithin)), dark chocolate contains cocoa solids 55 % minimum.
